data.body: Attestation for the operator-attested AC (pre-merge gate): verify-identity is now a PRE-MERGE job in the Gerrit Verified gate, landed as Gerrit change 772 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/772), merged to main (gerrit-verify.yaml 'verify-identity' job wired into the vote conclusion). Code fixes (sidecar scope exemption + null-ledger re-resolution + compaction fallback) landed as Gerrit change 771 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/771). Validated: 5 unit tests in tests/unit/test_identity_gate_scope_and_ledger.py, a mutation check (revert->RED, restore->GREEN), and the Source-2 investigation's real-store recovery (resolve_position_commit recovered 190/190 ledger positions to era-valid commits).
